mapper.select: SELECT * FROM sp_meeting_note WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
SELECT * FROM sp_meeting_note WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND supplier_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{supplierName}, '%') ORDER BY month_from DESC, gmt_create DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sp_meeting_note (id, supplier_name, month_from, month_to, note) VALUES (#{id}, #{supplierName}, #{monthFrom}, #{monthTo}, #{note})
mapper.update: UPDATE sp_meeting_note SET is_deleted = 1 WHERE id = #{id}
